item.title: CS50
item.description: Blog-CS50 Welcome to my blog! In this post, I’ll be sharing the key insights and experiences I gained from the CS50 course, along with an in-depth look at my final project. What I Learned in CS50 and My Final Project Welcome to my blog! In this post, I’ll be sharing the key insights and experiences I gained from the CS50 course, along with an in-depth look at my final project.
